# Companion Planting and Pollinators

Flowering companions draw pollinators that also help nearby crops.

Cross-domain references point at another domain explicitly, such as
[[astronomy:Seasonal Sky Guide]] for bloom timing and
[[product:Greenhouse Overview]] for indoor beds. A bare link like
[[Composting Basics]] stays inside this domain.
